case_title: CHRISTOPHER J. ARSENAULT VS. WENDY YEE et al

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARSENAULT, CHRISTOPHER J. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-19-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, WENDY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2009 - JUDGMENT. CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, RETURNED, SENT TO CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER: PARTIES ALL PRESENT, EVIDENCE RETAINED, NOTHING ON RECORD. CLERK-BETH WILBER, DEPT. 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARSENAULT, CHRISTOPHER J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YEE, WENDY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (HAVING REVIEWED THE EVIDENCE AND CONDUCTED A SITE VISIT, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DAMAGES SUSTAINED BY THE PLAINTIFF ARE NOT THE RESPONSIBILITY OF THE DEFENDANTS. THE PORTION OF THE TREE WHICH APPEARS TO HAVE BEEN HIT BY PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE DOES NOT EXTEND INTO, AND OBSTRUCT THE STREET.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $620.00 FILED BY ARSENAULT, CHRISTOPHER J. AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, WENDY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
